mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRD_DEFECT_HIS ( PLANT_CD, RESULT_ID, PROC_RESULT_ID, DEFECT_DT, DEFECT_TYPE, DEFECT_CD, DEFECT_NM, DEFECT_QTY, DEFECT_CAUSE, DEFECT_ACTION, DISPOSITION, DISPOSITION_QTY, DISPOSITION_DT, ITEM_CD, LOT_NO, WORKER_ID, EQUIPMENT_CD, PROCESS_CD, DEFECT_RMK, REG_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{request.plantCd}, #{request.resultId}, #{request.procResultId}, #{request.defectDt}, #{request.defectType}, #{request.defectCd}, #{request.defectNm}, #{request.defectQty}, #{request.defectCause}, #{request.defectAction}, #{request.disposition}, #{request.dispositionQty}, #{request.dispositionDt}, #{request.itemCd}, #{request.lotNo}, #{request.workerId}, #{request.equipmentCd}, #{request.processCd}, #{request.defectRmk}, #{regUserId} )
